# ctyun_kafka_topics (Data Source)
-> 详细说明请见文档：https://www.ctyun.cn/document/10029624/10144604**



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_kafka_topics" "tbidgqvfbs" {
    name = "init-kafka-topic"
    prod_inst_id = "4bd607df61d348b1949db223614315c1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `instance_id` (String) 实例ID
- `name` (String) 主题名称，模糊查询

### Optional

- `labels` (String) 标签
- `page_num` (Number) 分页中的页数，默认1，范围1-40000
- `page_size` (Number) 分页中的每页大小，默认10，范围1-40000
- `region_id` (String) 资源池ID

### Read-Only

- `max_partitions` (Number) 分区数量上限
- `remain_partitions` (Number) 剩余分区数量
- `topic_max_partitions` (Number) 主题最大分区数量
- `topics` (Attributes List) 主题列表 (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--topics))
- `total` (Number) 主题总数

<a id="nestedatt--topics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `topics`

Read-Only:

- `factor` (Number) 主题副本数
- `instance_id` (String) 实例ID
- `name` (String) 主题名称
- `partition_num` (Number) 主题分区数量
